text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the challenge of the Twinkle Series
approaching, Mejiro Ardan suddenly realizes she's
in a dream, reliving past experiences.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In her dream, she reexperiences all the struggles she's been through since her childhood, finding the origin of who she is now therein.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After awakening from her dream, Mejiro Ardan
senses the beginnings of her own history coming
to life and faces her training with renewed vigor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her goal is to stake her very life on whichever race is before her right now in order to leave her mark—a trail of light—on the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To ensure Mejiro Ardan can run with her whole
heart and soul in her upcoming debut race, we
both get ready to take on a host of new
challenges!
